name: Love's / Petro / TA-Petro (Ardmore-Pulaski-Cornersville)
reason: No Love's, Petro or TA/Petro could be confirmed on I-65 within exits 1-27; nearest confirmed Love's on I-65 TN is well north (Columbia/Exit 108 area), out of segment. No verifiable in-segment listing found.

name: Quik Mart (424 N Main St)
reason: In-town convenience store roughly 2.5 miles from I-65 Exit 27, not at the interstate and not a verified truck facility.

name: Nick's Grill
reason: On-site restaurant at Motel 6 Pulaski, not a distinct freight-service facility; captured within the Motel 6 listing.

name: East Tennessee I-75 production listings
reason: No overlap; all 61 existing TN production listings are on the I-75 East Tennessee corridor, none in this Middle/South TN I-65 segment.

name: Tennessee Weigh Station — I-65 (Giles County / Ardmore, near AL state line)
reason: Out of segment. THP District 7 scale complex sits at the south end of I-65 near the Alabama line (approx. exits 1-14, Giles County), well below the exit 27-53 window. Official THP CVE page (tn.gov) is egress-blocked (403), so direction/status could not be TDOT/THP-confirmed anyway.

name: Tennessee Weigh Station — I-65 (converted to truck parking, north of Nashville)
reason: Out of segment. The northbound weigh station converted to truck parking (TDOT project between SR-25 and SR-109, completed Sept 2024) is north of Nashville, far above exit 53.

name: I-65 Welcome Centers (Ardmore MM3 NB; Mitchellville MM121 SB)
reason: Out of segment. The only TDOT I-65 welcome centers/rest areas are at MM3 (AL line) and MM121 (KY side of Nashville); none between exits 27-53 (Marshall/Maury/Williamson).

name: Auto/glass shops in Spring Hill & Thompson's Station (Autobody Advantage, Safelite, Tire Discounters)
reason: Not freight/truck facilities. Only passenger auto-body, glass, and retail tire shops found near I-65 Exit 53; no verifiable truck stop, truck-service, truck wash, or heavy-duty tire facility.

name: Truck Parking Club — Columbia, TN (generic listing)
reason: Could not confirm a specific facility identity or street address for a standalone Truck Parking Club lot in this segment; no verifiable row could be built.

name: Alleged truck stop at I-65 Exit 32 / Exit 37 / Exit 53
reason: No independently verifiable truck stop, CAT Scale, truck wash, or tire facility found at these exits; a vague 'Pilot near Exit 32' snippet could not be corroborated and appears to conflate the Exit 22 Pilot.

name: Love's Travel Stop (I-65 Exit 46)
reason: Exit 46 is south of this segment's range (exits 53-74); belongs to the Maury County / southern I-65 segment, not the Franklin/Brentwood segment.

name: Love's Travel Stop #629 (I-65 Exit 108)
reason: Exit 108 is far north of range (Robertson/Sumner County, north Nashville metro); outside exits 53-74.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash (I-65 Exit 81 and Exit 95)
reason: Both Blue Beacon I-65 locations are north of range (exits 81 and 95, north Nashville metro); outside exits 53-74.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash - Antioch
reason: 611 Muci Dr serves I-24, not I-65; outside this I-65 segment.

name: Tennessee Weigh Station - I-65 (THP District 7 Scale House)
reason: Located at I-65 mile marker 55 near the Alabama line; outside this segment's geographic range and belongs to the southern I-65 TN segment.

name: Tennessee Weigh Station - I-65 (THP District 3 Scale House)
reason: Located at I-65 mile marker 119 north of Nashville; outside exits 53-74. No permanent weigh/scale complex exists on I-65 in Williamson/Davidson County per TDOT/THP.

name: Truck Parking Club - Franklin
reason: TruckParkingClub advertises Franklin-area listings, but specific facility name/street address, space count, and I-65 proximity could not be independently confirmed (site blocked at egress gateway; no address in search snippets). Held to avoid guessing address.

name: Truck Parking Club - Spring Hill
reason: TruckParkingClub advertises Spring Hill listings, but no specific verifiable address/space count could be confirmed; site blocked at egress gateway. Held to avoid guessing.

name: Cool Springs / Brentwood hotels (Drury, Marriott, Residence Inn, Comfort Inn, etc.)
reason: Upscale business/extended-stay hotels near Cool Springs; several charge for standard car parking and none could be independently confirmed to permit overnight semi/truck parking. Category-fit not confirmed; excluded rather than guess truck access.

name: Pilot Travel Center #292 (Trinity Lane)
reason: Same site as 130 W Trinity Ln, now rebranded/operating as Love's Travel Stop #429 (identical address and phone 615-226-6393). Not a distinct facility; would duplicate the Love's listing.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Nashville
reason: Conflicting source data on location and corridor: Waze lists 611 Much Dr, Nashville 37207; but Yelp/businessyab/truckerpath list the operating site as 611 Muci Dr, Antioch 37013 served by I-24 Exit 62, and other directory entries cite I-65 Exit 86/95. I-65-vs-I-24 identity and exit could not be independently confirmed; the operating facility appears to be on I-24 (Antioch), so excluded from the I-65 segment. Also a 'Blue Beacon of Nashville opening soon' PDF exists, suggesting relocation. Recommend a dedicated I-24 pass verify it.

name: Pilot Travel Center #413
reason: 6418 Centennial Blvd (TN-155/Briley Pkwy exit 26, I-40 west side, NOT I-65). Yelp lists it as CLOSED (updated 2026). Excluded: permanently closed and not on I-65.

name: TravelCenters of America - Nashville (111 N 1st St)
reason: Downtown TA ('Candy Store' / #034) permanently closed per Landline Media report. Excluded (closed).

name: TA Franklin (Peytonsville Rd)
reason: I-65 Exit 61, ~13 miles south of this segment (exits 74-90). Belongs to a southern I-65 segment, not seg4.

name: TGC Auto & Truck Repair
reason: 321 E Trinity Ln, 37207 (near I-65 exit 87) but a small Mon-Sat auto/truck repair shop; heavy-truck (semi) access and category-fit not independently confirmed. Held out pending verification.

name: Tennessee weigh / scale stations on I-65
reason: No THP commercial-vehicle scale house exists on I-65 within exits 74-90. Nearest I-65 scales are MM 55 (Giles County, near Ardmore, south) and MM 119 (Robertson County, near Portland, north) — both far outside this Davidson County segment.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Nashville
reason: Located at I-24 Exit 62 (611 Muci Dr), serves I-24 — not the I-65 northern segment; out of scope.

name: CAT Scale / TA — Franklin (Exit 61)
reason: I-65 Exit 61 is south of Nashville, outside this segment's exit 90-121 range.

name: CAT Scale — Nashville (I-24/I-65 Exit 87A)
reason: Downtown Nashville junction, south of the segment's northern range and primarily an I-24/I-65 split location.

name: Exxon (AM Express) / Shell — Portland Exit 117
reason: Fuel/convenience stations with diesel but no confirmed dedicated truck parking; category-fit as a truck stop not verified. Earlier 'Love's at Exit 117' references were a mix-up with I-24 and are not real.

name: Holiday Inn Express / Hampton Inn / Quality Inn — White House (Exit 108)
reason: Hotels near Exit 108; truck/semi overnight parking not independently confirmed (brand pages do not verify truck parking, and Love's #629 truck parking is adjacent). Held out pending confirmation.

name: Interstate Fleet Services / West Power Services / TRUCKUP / Mobile Tractor Trailer Repair
reason: Mobile roadside dispatch services without a confirmed fixed street address or verifiable single-facility identity in this segment; excluded per no-guess rule.

name: Millersville travel center (Exit 98)
reason: No dedicated truck stop / travel center with truck parking confirmed at Exit 98 (US-31W); gas stations only.

name: Robertson County Welcome Center (SB, ~MM 121, Mitchellville)
reason: Welcome center / rest area is not one of the eight target categories; not created as its own row. (Associated weigh-station and truck-parking items handled separately as held listings.)
